character.name: Slim young male character in pixel art, low top-down view, realistic proportions, not chibi. Black straight thick hair with a heavy fringe covering part of the forehead and slightly over the eyes. Light skin tone. Wearing a black jacket or black hoodie layered over a light gray hood, dark charcoal pants, beige or off-white sneakers, and a medium black backpack. Neutral expression. Modern casual streetwear look. Keep the design simple and readable for game sprite rotations. Do not make him bulky, wide, round, or oversized. Do not make the head too large. Preserve a slim silhouette and grounded stance suitable for directional walking sprites.
